title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.070 - Denial, suspension or revocation of license
text:
197.070.  Denial, suspension or revocation of license. — The department of health and senior services may deny, suspend or revoke a license in any case in which it finds that there has been a substantial failure to comply with the requirements established under this law and section 197.005.
(L. 1953 p. 631 § 7, A.L. 1978 S.B. 661, A.L. 2017 S.B. 50 merged with S.B. 501)
Effective 7-01-18
